nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Alagoas antwren
nodes.summary: Alagoas antwren（Alagoas antwren，学名 Myrmotherula snowi），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要分布于常綠森林，主要威胁包括猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits isolated fragments of semi-humid lowland evergreen forest and is known only from the narrow elevational range of

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The site continues to be threatened by fires spreading from adjacent plantations, hunting, timber extraction and agriculture." "The massive clearance of Atlantic forest in Alagoas and Pernambuco has left few other sites likely to support populations of this species
